title: HardcorePvP
description: minimal hardcore pvp, die only to players, track lives & deaths, multilang for paper
body:
hardcorepvp is a super chill plugin i made cuz i couldn’t find a minimal one where you only die for real if another player kills you (less brutal than normal hardcore)

- keeps track of your lives, lets you check them with /lives
- see your death count with /stats
- admins can revive players or check their lives with /revive and /lives <player>

all texts are fully configurable (/hardcorepvp/config.yml) and there are two languages available (english and french), but feel free to create your own (/hardcorepvp/lang/xx.yml)
